name: Monitor Tier — Stop Bleeding Money You Can't See
description: 5-step urgency-framed sales pitch for the Monitor tier, designed for cold outreach prospects who just clicked a demo link from email or DM.

steps.title: [BAR_NAME] Is Probably Losing $2,400/mo Right Now
steps.annotation: We pulled industry data for bars in [BAR_NAME]'s revenue range. The average loss to undetected voids, missed peak windows, and underperforming shifts is $2,400/month. You won't see it in your P&L — that's the problem.
steps.screen_hint: Hard-hitting opening popup with the $2,400/mo loss figure in large red type and a small skull/leak icon.

steps.title: This Is What CoreTAP Sees That You Don't
steps.annotation: Live Revenue Pulse, Active Void Alerts, Golden Hours peak windows, Staff Performance grading — all on one screen for [BAR_NAME], updated every 5 minutes from your POS. No reports to run. No spreadsheets to build.
steps.screen_hint: Full dashboard view with all Monitor-tier widgets visible and labeled with arrows/numbers.

steps.title: Monitor Tier — $449/mo. Pays for Itself in Week 2.
steps.annotation: $449/month gets you the full Monitor tier on [BAR_NAME]: live dashboard, Golden Hours, void alerts, and staff grading. Average customer recovers the subscription cost in their first 14 days. Most recover it in the first week.
steps.screen_hint: Pricing callout card with $449/mo prominently shown and the 'pays for itself in week 2' guarantee.

steps.title: Every Day You Wait, You Lose $80
steps.annotation: If the average bar loses $2,400/month, that's $80/day. Every day you put off booking a demo, you're choosing to let $80 walk out the door at [BAR_NAME]. We're not selling software — we're selling the dollars you're already losing.
steps.screen_hint: Urgency popup with '$80/day lost' counter visualization, ideally with a daily clock animation hint.

steps.title: Book a 20-Minute Demo. See Your Bar's Number.
steps.annotation: 20 minutes on Calendly. We'll pull a sample of [BAR_NAME]'s public data and show you the specific dollar amount we'd expect to recover in month one. If the number isn't worth your time, we don't ask for a second meeting.
steps.screen_hint: Calendly booking widget overlay with available time slots visible and a 'See My Number' headline.
